modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to create channels in Microsoft Teams.

full_description_text: So, the user was trying to set up new channels in their Microsoft Team, but they hit a snag. They weren't sure how to do it, and it seemed like something was off. It’s a bit frustrating when you just want to organize your team better, right?
short_description: Unable to create channels in Microsoft Teams.
description: So, the user was trying to set up new channels in their Microsoft Team, but they hit a snag. They weren't sure how to do it, and it seemed like something was off. It’s a bit frustrating when you just want to organize your team better, right?
